rules: No real business photos were supplied. Do not fabricate or hotlink stock photos.
Use layout, typography, cards, gradients, and service-specific microcopy to create quality.
If the scraper can collect public photos from the business's own website or profile, add them to business.photos before generation.

registryNotes.hero: Large editorial headline with right-side service summary panel.
registryNotes.proof: Short proof points across a horizontal strip.
registryNotes.services: Four to six cards with short descriptions.
